missing_capability.description: A required capability is absent from the attempt output.

weak_evidence.description: The finding exists but evidence_span is missing or too vague.

output_contract_error.description: The output violates the required schema or required fields.

false_positive_risk.description: The output flags unsupported or environment-mismatched findings.

unsafe_action_risk.description: The attempt proposes or executes unsafe actions outside the task boundary.

regression_observed.description: A repair breaks a previously passing capability or contract.

high_cost_low_gain.description: The repair spends budget without improving verifier-observed quality.

target_context_missing.description: The target lacks context needed to make a grounded decision.

ownership_boundary_missing.description: Access-control output fails to bind object owner, tenant, role, or scope.

config_path_missing.description: The output does not bind a finding to a concrete config path/environment.

overbroad_finding.description: The finding is generic and not tied to target evidence.
